description.name: PaymentHub - Crypto Payments
description.tagline: Accept Bitcoin (BTC) and USDT (TRC-20) payments in WHMCS via PaymentHub.
description.long: PaymentHub Gateway for WHMCS allows hosting companies and businesses to accept cryptocurrency payments (Bitcoin and USDT TRC-20) directly on their WHMCS invoices. Features automatic invoice marking via webhooks, HMAC-SHA256 signature verification, duplicate transaction protection, and a multi-coin checkout option.
features: Automatic invoice marking via secure webhooks
Multi-coin mode lets customers choose their preferred crypto
Duplicate transaction detection and amount validation
Full transaction logging in WHMCS Gateway Log
